title: Invalidate one feedback item by feedback ID or item identifier
description:
As a Plexus operator
I want to invalidate one specific feedback item from the CLI or MCP using a feedback ID or any identifier that resolves to the underlying Item
So that approved invalidations do not depend on the dashboard UI succeeding.

## Acceptance Criteria
- CLI command: `plexus feedback invalidate <identifier>`
- MCP tool exposes the same single-item invalidation capability
- `<identifier>` may be a feedback item ID, an item ID, an item externalId, or an identifier-table value
- If an item identifier maps to multiple feedback items, the command refuses to mutate and tells the operator how to disambiguate
- No command path invalidates more than one feedback item in a single invocation
- The mutation marks `isInvalid=true` and returns the updated feedback item details

## Gherkin Specification
```gherkin
Feature: Invalidate a specific feedback item by flexible identifier
  As a Plexus operator
  I want to invalidate one approved feedback item from tooling
  So that I am not blocked on the dashboard UI

Scenario: Invalidate by direct feedback item ID
  Given a feedback item exists with ID "feedback-123"
  When I run `plexus feedback invalidate feedback-123`
  Then that feedback item is updated with `isInvalid=true`
  And the command returns the updated feedback item details

Scenario: Invalidate by item identifier when there is one matching feedback item
  Given an item identifier value resolves to item "item-123"
  And exactly one feedback item exists for that item
  When I run `plexus feedback invalidate CUSTOMER-42`
  Then the matching feedback item is updated with `isInvalid=true`

Scenario: Refuse ambiguous item matches
  Given an item identifier resolves to item "item-123"
  And multiple feedback items exist for that item
  When I run `plexus feedback invalidate CUSTOMER-42`
  Then no feedback item is updated
  And the command explains how to disambiguate with scorecard and score

Scenario: Invalidate by item identifier for a specific score
  Given an item identifier resolves to item "item-123"
  And multiple feedback items exist for that item
  When I run `plexus feedback invalidate CUSTOMER-42 --scorecard "Test Scorecard" --score "Eligibility"`
  Then the matching feedback item for that score is updated with `isInvalid=true`
  And no other feedback items are changed
```
